result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text - text
LINE 3:        AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) A...
                                                  ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS handled_cases,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND id IN (
      SELECT caseid__c
      FROM casehistory__c
      WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
      GROUP BY caseid__c
      HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
  )
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS handled_cases,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND id IN (
      SELECT caseid__c
      FROM casehistory__c
      WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
      GROUP BY caseid__c
      HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
  )
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS handled_cases,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate::timestamp - createddate::timestamp))) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND id IN (
      SELECT caseid__c
      FROM casehistory__c
      WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
      GROUP BY caseid__c
      HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
  )
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS handled_cases,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate::timestamp - createddate::timestamp))) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND id IN (
      SELECT caseid__c
      FROM casehistory__c
      WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
      GROUP BY caseid__c
      HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
  )
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) AS handled_cases,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp))) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM "Case" c
JOIN casehistory__c ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id AND ch.field__c = 'Owner'
WHERE c.createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND c.createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) AS handled_cases,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp))) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM "Case" c
JOIN casehistory__c ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id AND ch.field__c = 'Owner'
WHERE c.createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND c.createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS assignments
FROM "Case" c
JOIN casehistory__c ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id AND ch.field__c = 'Owner'
WHERE c.createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND c.createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
GROUP BY c.ownerid
ORDER BY assignments DESC
LIMIT 10;
